blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 118 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
